hero.subtitle: Clean listings, curated experiences, and direct support—built for fast decisions.

citiesSection.title: Explore Our Cities
citiesSection.description: Choose from Egypt's top coastal destinations for lifestyle, investment, and adventure.

about.title: Built for fast decisions—travel, tours, and coastal homes.
about.lead: AirShip is your Red Sea co-pilot. We curate destinations, tours, and real estate opportunities with clean listings, clear pricing, and direct support—so you can decide quickly and confidently.

points.title: Curated, not cluttered
points.body: We hand-pick what matters: highlights, inclusions, and the real reasons to choose a place.

points.title: Local insight, global polish
points.body: Destination guidance that feels premium—without the sales pressure.

points.title: Direct support
points.body: Questions? You get fast answers—no long forms, no waiting days.

testimonialsSection.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonialsSection.description: Real feedback from travelers and buyers. Quick, clear, and consistent.
